sentences.text_original: 你好，我想买一张明天去杭州的高铁票。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng mǎi yī zhāng míngtiān qù Hángzhōu de gāotiě piào.
sentences.text_translation: Assalomu alaykum, ertangi Xanchjouga ketadigan bitta tezyurar poyezd chiptasi olmoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Здравствуйте, я хочу купить один билет на скоростной поезд до Ханчжоу на завтра.
sentences.text_translation_en: Hello, I'd like to buy a high-speed train ticket to Hangzhou for tomorrow.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好的，请问您要几点的车？我们明天有好几趟车。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, qǐngwèn nín yào jǐ diǎn de chē? Wǒmen míngtiān yǒu hǎojǐ tàng chē.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, soat nechadagi poyezd kerak? Ertaga bir necha reys bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, на какое время вам поезд? У нас завтра несколько рейсов.
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure, what time would you like? We have several trains tomorrow.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 上午的比较好，十点左右有吗？
sentences.pinyin: Shàngwǔ de bǐjiào hǎo, shí diǎn zuǒyòu yǒu ma?
sentences.text_translation: Tushdan oldingisi yaxshiroq, soat o'nlar atrofida bormi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Лучше утренний, есть что-нибудь около десяти?
sentences.text_translation_en: Morning would be better — is there one around ten?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 有的，明天上午十点十五分有一趟，到达时间是十二点半。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu de, míngtiān shàngwǔ shí diǎn shíwǔ fēn yǒu yī tàng, dàodá shíjiān shì shí'èr diǎn bàn.
sentences.text_translation: Bor, ertaga ertalab soat o'n-u o'n besh daqiqada bitta reys bor, yetib borish vaqti o'n ikki yarim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Есть, завтра в 10:15 один рейс, время прибытия — половина первого.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes, there's one at 10:15 tomorrow morning, arriving at 12:30.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 二等座还有票吗？多少钱？
sentences.pinyin: Èrděng zuò hái yǒu piào ma? Duōshao qián?
sentences.text_translation: Ikkinchi toifa o'rindiqqa chipta bormi? Qancha turadi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Билеты во второй класс ещё есть? Сколько стоит?
sentences.text_translation_en: Are there still second-class seats? How much?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 二等座还有票，票价是一百五十八块。
sentences.pinyin: Èrděng zuò hái yǒu piào, piàojià shì yībǎi wǔshíbā kuài.
sentences.text_translation: Ikkinchi toifa o'rindiqqa chipta bor, narxi bir yuz ellik sakkiz yuan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Билеты во второй класс есть, цена — сто пятьдесят восемь юаней.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes, second-class is available, the price is 158 yuan.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 靠窗的座位还有吗？我想看风景。
sentences.pinyin: Kàochuāng de zuòwèi hái yǒu ma? Wǒ xiǎng kàn fēngjǐng.
sentences.text_translation: Deraza yonidagi o'rindiq bormi? Manzarani tomosha qilmoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Есть ли места у окна? Хочу смотреть на пейзаж.
sentences.text_translation_en: Are there any window seats left? I'd like to see the scenery.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我帮您查一下……靠窗的还有，F座，可以吗？
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bāng nín chá yíxià …… kàochuāng de hái yǒu, F zuò, kěyǐ ma?
sentences.text_translation: Tekshirib ko'ray... deraza yonidagisi bor, F o'rindiq, bo'ladimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сейчас посмотрю… у окна ещё есть, место F, подойдёт?
sentences.text_translation_en: Let me check for you… there's a window seat, seat F, is that okay?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: That works. I'll take this one.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好的，请出示您的身份证。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, qǐng chūshì nín de shēnfènzhèng.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, please show your ID card.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 好的，已经出票了。这是您的车票，请收好。进站的时候刷身份证就可以了。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, yǐjīng chū piào le. Zhè shì nín de chēpiào, qǐng shōu hǎo. Jìn zhàn de shíhou shuā shēnfènzhèng jiù kěyǐ le.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, chipta chiqarildi. Bu sizning chiptangiz, ehtiyot qilib saqlang. Bekatga kirayotganda shaxsiy guvohnomani skanerlasangiz bo'ldi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, билет оформлен. Вот ваш билет, сохраните его. При входе на станцию просто приложите удостоверение.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, the ticket has been issued. Here's your ticket, please keep it safe. When entering the station, just scan your ID card.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 好的，谢谢。我想问一下，如果我要改签或者退票，应该怎么办？
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxie. Wǒ xiǎng wèn yíxià, rúguǒ wǒ yào gǎiqiān huòzhě tuìpiào, yīnggāi zěnme bàn?
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, rahmat. Bir narsani so'ramoqchiman, agar chiptani o'zgartirmoqchi yoki qaytarmoqchi bo'lsam, qanday qilaman?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, спасибо. Хочу спросить: если мне нужно поменять билет или вернуть его, как это сделать?
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, thanks. I'd like to ask — if I want to change or refund the ticket, what should I do?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 改签的话，开车前半小时可以在网上或者车站窗口办理。退票的话，开车前八小时以上可以退，但要收手续费。
sentences.pinyin: Gǎiqiān dehuà, kāichē qián bàn xiǎoshí kěyǐ zài wǎngshàng huòzhě chēzhàn chuāngkǒu bànlǐ. Tuìpiào dehuà, kāichē qián bā xiǎoshí yǐshàng kěyǐ tuì, dàn yào shōu shǒuxù fèi.
sentences.text_translation: Chiptani o'zgartirmoqchi bo'lsangiz, poyezd jo'nashidan yarim soat oldin internetda yoki bekat kassasida rasmiylashtirsangiz bo'ladi. Qaytarmoqchi bo'lsangiz, jo'nashdan sakkiz soatdan ko'proq oldin qaytarish mumkin, lekin xizmat haqi olinadi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Чтобы поменять билет, можно за полчаса до отправления оформить онлайн или в кассе вокзала. Для возврата — не позднее чем за восемь часов до отправления, но возьмут сервисный сбор.
sentences.text_translation_en: To change it, you can do so online or at the station window up to half an hour before departure. For a refund, you can return it more than eight hours before departure, but a service fee applies.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 明白了。那如果我想改到下午，手续费多少钱？
sentences.pinyin: Míngbai le. Nà rúguǒ wǒ xiǎng gǎi dào xiàwǔ, shǒuxù fèi duōshao qián?
sentences.text_translation: Tushundim. Unda tushdan keyingisiga o'zgartirsam, xizmat haqi qancha bo'ladi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Понятно. А если я захочу перенести на вторую половину дня, сколько будет сервисный сбор?
sentences.text_translation_en: I see. So if I want to change it to the afternoon, how much is the service fee?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 改签不收费，只要改的车票价格跟原票一样就不用加钱。
sentences.pinyin: Gǎiqiān bù shōu fèi, zhǐyào gǎi de chēpiào jiàgé gēn yuán piào yíyàng jiù búyòng jiā qián.
sentences.text_translation: Chiptani o'zgartirish uchun haq olinmaydi, faqat yangi chipta narxi asl chipta bilan bir xil bo'lsa, qo'shimcha to'lov shart emas.
sentences.text_translation_ru: За смену билета плата не берётся: если цена нового билета такая же, как у исходного, доплачивать не нужно.
sentences.text_translation_en: Changing the ticket is free — as long as the new ticket costs the same as the original, there's no extra charge.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ jìzhù le. Xièxie!
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, I've got it. Thank you!
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Bú kèqi! Zhù nín lǚtú yúkuài!
sentences.text_translation_en: You're welcome! Have a pleasant journey!
sentences.speaker: B
